<!--
The PR Title should be in the following format:
[<Work Item>] [<Type>] <Description>

Accepted Types:
- feature: A new feature
- fix: A bug fix
- docs: Documentation only changes
- release: Changes related to the release process
- hotfix: Critical bug fix
- breaking: Breaking changes

If the PR addresses multiple work items, link them to the PR. However there should be only one PR per work item to simplify tracking and code review.

Example:
[1234] [feature] Add new feature

-->

# Pull Request

---

:information_source: Ensure your PR title follows the format `[<Work Item>] [<Type>] <Description>`

---

## Checklist

<!-- Use the check-boxes [x] on the options that are relevant. -->

- [ ] My corresponding pipelines / checks run clean and green without any errors or warnings
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (readme)
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the test cases
- [ ] I did format my code
